import React from 'react'; import { ChevronLeft, ShieldCheck, ArrowRight, Wallet, CreditCard } from 'lucide-react'; const ConfirmPaymentScreen = ({ type = "Transaction", amount = 0, source = "Nest Balance", destination = "Savings Vault", fee = 0, onBack, onConfirm, }) => { const total = parseFloat(amount) + parseFloat(fee); return (
{/* Header */}

Review {type}

{/* Body */}
{/* Total Amount */}

Total to Pay

${total.toLocaleString(undefined, { minimumFractionDigits: 2 })}

{/* Source → Destination */}
{source.toLowerCase().includes("card") ? : }
{source}
{destination}
{/* Fee Breakdown */}
Amount ${amount.toLocaleString()}
Transaction Fee {fee === 0 ? "FREE" : `$${fee.toLocaleString()}`}
Final Total ${total.toLocaleString()}
{/* Security Notice */}

By clicking confirm, you authorize Nest to process this transaction. Funds will be moved instantly.

{/* Confirm Button */}
); }; export default ConfirmPaymentScreen;
